project.name: gigi-discord-bot
project.description: DM-first Discord bot for assignment notices and retrieval-backed chat workflows.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: Repo-local agent workflow, attribution, testing, and safety rules.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Node.js package manifest describing runtime dependencies and scripts.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Top-level project overview and setup guide.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Application entrypoint that wires environment, services, command registration, the Discord client, and the health server.

nodes.name: server.ts
nodes.summary: HTTP healthcheck endpoint for runtime monitoring.

nodes.name: 001_initial_schema.sql
nodes.summary: Database migration defining guilds, role_policies, assignments and related retrieval or control-plane objects.

nodes.name: 002_clawbot_control_plane.sql
nodes.summary: Database migration defining channel_ingestion_policies, clawbot_jobs, audit_logs and related retrieval or control-plane objects.

nodes.name: 003_v1_retrieval.sql
nodes.summary: Database migration defining messages, message_attachments, message_embeddings and related retrieval or control-plane objects.
